name: Legend of Eldia
description: Original fantasy world-building setting for 'Legend of Eldia'. Includes core original elements such as the Kingdom of Eldia, the Sacred Emblems, the Guardian, the Princess, and the Dark Lord. Ideal for fantasy adventure roleplay.

entries.content: The Sacred Emblems are an ancient legacy left behind by the three great spirits (Ignis, Aqua, and Terra). They are divided into three: the Emblem of Power (borne by the Dark Lord), the Emblem of Wisdom (borne by the Princess), and the Emblem of Courage (borne by the Guardian). Whoever gathers all three gains absolute power, but if their heart lacks balance, the emblem will shatter. The emblems hold the power to grant wishes.

The Kingdom of Eldia spans a lush, verdant land. Centered on Eldia Castle, it is home to Crystal Village, Crystal Lake, the Dwarven Mines, the Phoenix Nest, and many other places where various races coexist. It is rich in nature, featuring the Lumina Plains, the Flame Mountains, the Silver River, and the Lake of Light. The kingdom is periodically threatened by the Dark Lord, but it is protected by the efforts of the Guardian and the Princess.

The Eternal Blade is a holy sword that dispels darkness. Enshrined in the 'Temple of Time,' it can only be drawn by the chosen Guardian. Also known as the 'Sword of Eternity,' it unleashes tremendous power against evil beings such as the Dark Lord. The spirit Lumina dwells within the blade and guides the Guardian. Wielding it requires the Emblem of Courage and a strong heart.

Many different races exist in Eldia: the Eldians (humans), the Water Folk (an aquatic race), the Rock Folk (a mineral-born race), the Wing Folk (a winged race), the Desert Folk (desert warriors), the Ancient Folk (a clan that inherits ancient magic), and the Forest Spirits (guardians of nature). Each race has its own unique culture and abilities, and they work together to protect Eldia.

The Crystal Orb is the crystallization of advanced magical technology developed by the Ancient Folk. It is equipped with runes (magic sigils) offering various functions, including energy bolts, gravity manipulation, time slowdown, and freezing magic. Players unlock the map at Crystal Towers and gain new abilities by clearing Trial Shrines. It is a vital item throughout the world of Eldia.

The Dark Lord is a demon king born of the Desert Folk. He bears the Emblem of Power and is a being close to immortal. Driven by ambition, he has attacked the Kingdom of Eldia many times. In his final form, he transforms into a monstrous beast. Only the Eternal Blade and the Arrow of Light can seal him away. Bound by a cycle of reincarnation, he is fated to battle the Guardian and the Princess for all eternity.

Alto is the name borne by the Guardian who appears across generations. His trademark is a green cloak and silver armor. He bears the Emblem of Courage and wields the Eternal Blade with mastery. Working together with various races, he defeats the Dark Lord through puzzle-solving and combat. Though a man of few words, he has a strong sense of justice and cannot ignore those in need. A different Guardian appears in each era, but all of them share the same heroic soul.

Serena is the Princess of the Kingdom of Eldia. She bears the Emblem of Wisdom and carries the bloodline of the goddess Lumina. She possesses powerful sealing abilities and wields sacred items such as the Crystal of Time and the Bow of Light. She works together with Alto to stand against the Dark Lord. Beautiful and intelligent, she does not hesitate to sacrifice herself for the kingdom and its people. She sometimes disguises herself in the guise of the Ancient Folk.
